final_text: The Professional plan is **$79 per user per month**, or **$63.20 per user per month** with annual billing (20% discount).

The Enterprise plan includes everything in Professional (which includes everything in Starter), plus these additional features:

- **Integrations:** Zapier integration, custom webhooks, custom integrations
- **Security:** SSO/SAML
- **Analytics:** Advanced analytics with custom report builders, cohort and funnel analysis, multi-pipeline revenue dashboards, goal tracking, and scheduled report delivery by email
- **Storage:** Unlimited storage
- **Support:** Phone support and a dedicated account manager
- **Reliability:** 99.9% uptime SLA

For more details on plans and pricing, or service levels and support, see our **Plans & Pricing** and **Service Levels & Support** pages.

To export your data, follow these steps:

### Full Account Export
1. Go to **Settings > Data Management > Export**
2. Start an export request
3. Processing takes up to **24 hours**
4. When ready, the export is delivered as a **ZIP file via email** to the requesting admin

The ZIP file contains **CSV files** — one for each record type (contacts, deals, activities, notes, custom fields). Attachments are included as a separate folder inside the ZIP when present.

### Report Export
Any report can be exported to CSV from the report's **Export** button.

**Note:** Data export is available on all plan tiers.

To reset your password in EggCRM:

- Click the **"Forgot password?"** link on the login page.
- EggCRM will email a reset link to your registered email address; the link is valid for 60 minutes.
- A support agent can also initiate a password-reset email for you (agents never view or set passwords directly).

If you need any further assistance with this or have issues with the reset link, just let me know!

To generate an API key:

1. Go to **Settings > Integrations > API Keys > Generate New Key**
2. Copy the key when it is displayed — it is shown only once
3. The key inherits the permissions of the role you assign it (read-only or read-write) and can be scoped to specific resources
4. Keys are listed (by prefix and label, never the full secret) on the same page, where they can be revoked

**Note:** API access requires the Professional plan or higher.
**No** — Zapier is **Enterprise-only** and isn't available on the Starter plan. You would need to be on an Enterprise tier to connect Zapier.

Yes, this is a known issue.

**Known issue:** Dashboards and large reports can load slowly during peak hours, approximately **9–11 AM ET**, when aggregate query load is highest. A fix is scheduled for an upcoming release.

**How to tell if this is the known issue:**
- Slowness occurs **within** the 9–11 AM ET window
- Only affects dashboards/reports (not core navigation or record pages)

**Workarounds while the fix ships:**
- Narrow the date range on your report/dashboard (fewer records = faster)
- Reduce widgets per dashboard; split heavy dashboards into two
- Run heavy reports outside 9–11 AM ET when timing is flexible
- Export to CSV for large pulls instead of rendering on screen

**If your slowness is outside that window or affects other parts of the app**, treat it as a separate problem. In that case, gathering details would help us assist further — for example: browser/version, specific dashboard/report, time/timezone, record volume, and any error messages.

You can also check the **EggCRM status page** for any active incidents before filing a ticket.

Hi! It looks like your message got cut off. Could you let me know how I can help you today? I'm here to assist with questions about EggCRM — whether it's about product features, your account, billing, pricing, or anything else.

Here's what I found for your billing and operations questions:

---

**1. Proration when upgrading mid-cycle**
When you upgrade plans via Settings > Billing > Plan:
- The new tier takes effect **immediately**
- You're charged a **prorated amount** for the remainder of your current billing cycle
- You gain all the new tier's features right away

---

**2. Annual billing lock-in**
No, annual billing **does not lock you in**. You can switch between monthly and annual billing at any renewal under Settings > Billing. 

Annual billing is paid up front for the year and includes a **20% discount** off the monthly price. 

If you want to cancel your account, you'll need **30 days' notice**, and cancellation requests must be escalated to the retention team (I can help with that if you'd like).

---

**3. Data handling when downgrading**
Downgrades take effect **at the start of the next billing cycle**, and you keep your current features until that point.

However, the documentation doesn't specify what happens to your data (retention, export, or whether any is lost). I can escalate that to our **retention team** if you'd like more clarity on data handling during a plan downgrade.

---

**4. Seat limits**
Unfortunately, I don't have documentation on EggCRM's seat limits — it's not covered in what's currently available. If you'd like, I can escalate this to the product team for more details.

---

Would you like me to escalate any of these open questions (especially the data handling during downgrade and seat limits) to the retention or product team for more specific answers?

I want to make sure this is accurate against our current documentation — if anything looks off, I can connect you with a specialist to confirm.
